title: antennaria alpina var. compacta
intro: Antennaria alpina var. compacta, also known as mountain everlasting or compact mountain everlasting, is a low-growing, flowering perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its compact growth habit and small, white, pink, or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its essential oils and sesquiterpene lactones. The medicinal properties of Antennaria alpina var. compacta have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, can be used to make teas, topical creams, and other remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
